chatbot.title: Mary — Marea Alta assistant
chatbot.welcome:
Hi! I’m Mary, Marea Alta’s virtual assistant. Pick a topic to learn about this site, our shrimp, the QR code, and how restaurants can use it.

To reach our team, choose “Contact / WhatsApp.”

replies.site:
This site connects anyone buying or serving our shrimp with a verifiable story for each lot. The home page introduces Marea Alta. Public traceability opens when you scan the package QR or use the lot lookup: it’s a read-only page—no account needed.

Supply-chain operators use a separate sign-in console to record milestones; you only see what was published for that lot.
replies.product:
Marea Alta is Ecuador-origin shrimp focused on a natural product, lot-level traceability, and partners across grow-out, lab, and co-packing. Each published lot can show product data (presentation, size, SalmoFan color, certifications, etc.) and a timeline so your guest gets transparency.

For supply, co-packing, or commercial terms, WhatsApp is the direct line to our team.
replies.qr:
On the label or case you’ll find a unique lot code and a QR code.

1) Open your phone camera or any QR reader.

2) Point at the code until it reads the link.

3) Opening it takes you to that lot’s public trace page on this site—no separate app or sign-up.

You can also type the code printed on the pack if your home screen offers that lookup.
replies.info:
After following the QR link you’ll see, for that lot, details such as product and SKU, presentation and packaging, commercial size, pieces per pound, SalmoFan color, published certifications, lot identification, and a traceability timeline with stages and partners the chain recorded and made public.

No sign-in is required—it’s read-only information for diners and businesses.
replies.restaurants:
In restaurants and food service you can place the QR on the menu, menu board, or packaging so guests verify origin and lot, build trust, and strengthen your story. We support market grades, co-packing, and steady supply depending on your operation.

For volumes, partnerships, menu planning, or logistics, message us on WhatsApp to reach sales.
replies.contact: For orders, pricing, supply, co-packing, or other commercial questions, message us on WhatsApp. The button opens WhatsApp (app or web) with our number.

hero.title: Lot traceability you can verify
hero.lead: SupplyTrack helps producers share the story of each production lot—from farm or pond through processing to the shelf. As a member of the public, you can confirm what you’re buying by scanning a code on the package. No account is required.

hero.titleLine2: We sell health, confidence, and a story of excellence.
hero.subtitle: 100% natural product, free of unnecessary chemicals; full traceability with a QR code on every lot. We’re not just another distributor—we guard a higher standard.

story.title: Born from the consumer, for the consumer
story.quote: My wife and I have always loved a good dinner, but I kept hitting the same wall: the freedom and confidence to eat seafood safely—and shrimp worried me most. For years I avoided dishes with shrimp, farmed or not. That tension comes from my path as a shrimp producer and marine biologist: I worked this link in the chain and contributed at the National Aquaculture Control office and with major input companies. I learned Ecuador’s production methodology ranks among the best in the world—yet much of that product never stays in-country. What we often eat ends up being shrimp from rejected lots, inventory close to expiry, or dubious origin.
story.body: Marea Alta is born from the consumer’s need to trust what they eat—and to enjoy a truly great experience.
story.author: Miguel Jaramillo

timeline.title: The problem few people want to name
timeline.lead: Four gaps where the market often fails—and where we focus every day.
timeline.e1Title: Where does the shrimp we serve really come from?
timeline.e1Desc: Without clarity on origin, lot, and chain, neither guests nor operators get the assurance they deserve.
timeline.e2Title: A market crowded with hidden treatments
timeline.e2Desc: Antibiotics, chlorine, and metabisulfite used to mask quality or stretch shelf life instead of growing shrimp the right way from the start.
timeline.e3Desc: They’re not just unhealthy—they strip authentic seafood taste and texture.
timeline.e4Desc: Guests are more demanding every day. Serving questionable quality puts your brand on the line.

trace.title: Traceability, purity, and flavor
trace.lead: Our commitment is a 100% natural product, free of unnecessary chemicals. Every lot carries a QR code so your guest can see when, where, and how that shrimp was harvested.
trace.purity: As producers with benchmark shrimp behind us, genetics, healthy extensive grow-out, and co-packing partners reinforce the standard all the way to the package.
trace.fact1: Reliable supply: harvest roughly every ~60 days.
trace.fact2: Commercial sizes aligned to market needs: 31/35 · 26/30 · 21/25.
trace.fact3: Inventory rotation: lots no older than 120 days from harvest.
trace.fact4: Custom co-packing that preserves true counts by size—with transparency.
trace.s1d1: Four production modules and technical rigor
trace.s2Desc: Controlled environments focused on nutrition and biosecurity.
trace.s2d1: Brackish waters and biosecurity—not routine medication
trace.s2d2: Flavor and texture that set the product apart
trace.s3Desc: Co-packing standards that respect cold chain and lot identity.
trace.s3d2: From pond to pack with freshness and trust

nonNegotiables.title: Our non-negotiable “nos”
nonNegotiables.lead: Clear value: what we refuse—and how we deliver instead.
nonNegotiables.n1Risk: Antimicrobial resistance and chemical residues in the final product.
nonNegotiables.n1Path: We grow in extensive, healthy, controlled environments focused on nutrition and biosecurity—not medication.
nonNegotiables.n2Risk: Used to “whiten” and superficially disinfect, altering taste and texture.
nonNegotiables.n2Path: Production protocols that remove off-flavors and odors that aren’t true shrimp.
nonNegotiables.n3Risk: Melanosis control in excess leaves aftertaste and hides real quality.
nonNegotiables.n3Path: Optimal cold chain end-to-end and shrimp shelf life no longer than 120 days from harvest—preserving natural color and flavor (sulfite-free).

differentiation.title: Marea Alta: Raise the standard for your business
differentiation.lead: What your guest and your brand gain when you choose a product with a verifiable story.
differentiation.d1Desc: Give your guests a product with a story and purity no one else can match.
differentiation.d2Desc: Full traceability and 100% free of antibiotics, chlorine, and metabisulfite.
differentiation.d3Desc: A superior gourmet experience in every meal thanks to controlled cold chain and immediate freshness.
differentiation.d4Desc: Save time with guaranteed quality through cook-ready packs and commercial grades tailored to your business.

testimonials.title: Stories on the menu and on the plate
testimonials.lead: Operators serving Marea Alta lean on verified narrative and brand peace of mind.
testimonials.t1Quote: I can finally tell guests where the shrimp comes from and back it with data from the QR. Less guesswork for my crew and a smoother experience on the floor.
testimonials.t2Quote: We moved from “just another shrimp” to a clear menu story—traceability and a product without chemical shortcuts. Our corporate clients notice it service after service.
testimonials.t3Quote: For room service and events we need to answer instantly when a guest asks about origin. With the lot QR the story is organized—my team no longer wings it.
testimonials.t4Quote: On the coast guests always compare. Here the shrimp tastes clean and traceability helps when groups ask for certifications without runaround.
testimonials.t5Quote: We run high-volume banquets: what I value most is every delivery arrives with clear lot data—my kitchen stops digging through old emails for certificates.

finalCta.title: Raise the standard for your business
finalCta.menuImageAlt: Restaurant menu card with QR codes next to seafood dishes at an oceanfront table—traceability on the menu
finalCta.subtitle: Message us on WhatsApp for supply and co-packing—or verify a lot by scanning the QR or entering the code on the package.

social.title: Social networks
social.lead: Follow Marea Alta for news, product stories, and behind-the-scenes from the coast.

diagram.consumerLead: Three simple steps—no app and no login.
diagram.packageExampleAlt: Marea Alta shrimp package label with production lot code, barcode, and QR for traceability
diagram.consumerAria: Consumer flow: packaging, scan, trace page
diagram.c1Body: Each production lot has a unique code on the label or box.
diagram.c2Body: The camera reads the link and opens this site in your browser.
diagram.c3Body: See specifications, partners, and the published timeline for that batch.
diagram.chainLead: Operators record each checkpoint; you only see what they publish for that lot.
diagram.chainSvgAria: Four stages: harvest, processing, label with QR, and scan on your phone

landing.footer: Marea Alta · Health, confidence, and excellence · Transparent traceability for those who serve and those who eat
